paper_metadata.subject_name: Financial Markets, Institutions and Financial Services

questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a Define financial markets and explain its significance. b Explain the instruments of the money market. c Explain Development Financial Institutions role in economic development. d Explain the angel investors in startup financing. e Why Non-Performing Assets are bad? f Describe the functions of RBI in regulating banks. g How do Insurance products contribute to capital market development? h Discuss the role of fintech in financial inclusion.
Explain the nature and mechanism of Indian financial system and the role of regulatory bodies like RBI and SEBI in its functioning.
Explain the functions of capital market. How do they support economic growth?
What is project financing? Explain the methods used in analyzing project feasibility for financing.
Explain different types of NBFCs and their functions.
Explain what is fund-based services and fee-based services. Give examples.
Why do companies need credit ratings? How does venture capital benefit startups?
What are the common challenges startups face in raising funds? Name two new funding methods
Define derivatives. How do they help investors manage risk?
